label: Stage end trigger (role arrived or in target bed)
description: Ends the stage when all specified roles have arrived or the target pawn is in their bed.

roleIds.label: Role IDs
roleIds.description: List of role IDs that must have arrived or be in the target bed.

clearTag.label: Clear tag
clearTag.description: If true, removes the arrival tag from role pawns when the trigger fires.

tag.label: Tag
tag.description: Pawn tag checked for the arrival condition.
